name: Air-Fried Sticky Rice Featuring Seitan

ingredients.item: cremini mushrooms, wiped clean, or any large mushrooms cut in half

method: Add the rice to a large saucepan with 2 cups water. Cover and bring to a boil. Turn the heat down to medium and cook for about 20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
If your air fryer doesn’t have a built-in insert, then insert one now.
Mix the soy sauce, maple syrup, garlic, Chinese five spice, ginger, and white wine together in a small bowl and set aside.

Place the mushrooms in the air fryer. If you can set your temperature, set it to 350°F. Otherwise, just turn it on—my air fryer temperature is built in and always cooks at 338°F. Cook for 10 minutes. Open the air fryer and add the seitan nuggets. If you don’t have a built-in self-stirrer in your air fryer, then stir. Pour the liquid mixture and peas over the top. Stir and cook 5 minutes.
Add rice and stir well. Heat for 2 minutes. Serve.
